title: Figma ingest contract
description: POST /figma-ingest — Ingests a Figma node and returns a fully-validated Stonewright Design Spec. Companion never writes to WordPress.

FigmaIngestRequest.description: Either figma_url OR both file_key + node_id must be supplied.

figma_url.description: Full Figma share URL. Mutually exclusive with file_key/node_id.

file_key.description: Figma file key (path segment after /file/ or /design/).

node_id.description: Figma node ID in 'NN:NN' colon form.

token_override.description: Optional Figma personal access token. Falls back to FIGMA_TOKEN env var.

warnings.description: Non-fatal ingestion warnings (unsupported node types, missing fills, etc.).

asset_count.description: Number of image assets discovered in the Figma node (before sideloading).
